overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban plaza with neon-lit advertising pillars, holographic displays, and reflective wet surfaces. The player character walks past NPCs and various corporate advertisements including Cirrus Cola and MaxiWear.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered pedestrian plaza with neon advertising pillars

events.description: approaching first group of NPCs sitting on illuminated benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza, approaching a seating area with NPCs

notable_agents.action: sitting on a white illuminated bench, facing away from the camera
standing and looking at a device, wearing a red jacket

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillar with rotating holographic advertisements and cyan neon base lighting
modern white bench with integrated ground lighting
transparent ceiling structure with floating holographic displays and geometric light patterns
rectangular water feature with dark reflective surface mirroring the neon lights
embedded cyan LED strips lining the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic covered plaza with wet reflective pavement and towering cylindrical advertising pillars emitting cyan and purple neon light. The camera approaches a seating area where NPCs rest on illuminated white benches, while holographic displays float overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner with large corporate billboard and seating areas

events.description: large Cirrus Cola billboard becomes prominently visible on the right side of the plaza
camera turns left to navigate around the seating area and billboard

agents.ego_description: walking past the standing NPC and turning left to continue through the plaza

notable_agents.action: standing still looking at a handheld device, wearing distinctive red jacket and shorts

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement displaying 'CIRRUS COLA FEEL FREE' in white text against dark red background
tall dark building with illuminated windows and corporate signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera passes close to a standing NPC in a red jacket and reveals a massive Cirrus Cola advertisement on the right. The scene transitions as the camera turns left, moving away from the initial pillars toward a more open area of the plaza with the MaxiWear building becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with reflective water features and multiple holographic pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the central plaza area, navigating between advertising pillars and water features

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the expansive central plaza characterized by multiple neon advertising pillars, rectangular reflective pools, and geometric light patterns on the ceiling. The MaxiWear building gradually moves from the left to the center of the frame as the camera progresses forward through the wet, mirror-like pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to MaxiWear corporate building entrance

events.description: MaxiWear building facade becomes the dominant feature ahead with clear corporate signage

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the MaxiWear building entrance, passing the final advertising pillars

entered.detail: illuminated corporate logo and text 'MAXIWEAR' on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the MaxiWear corporate building, which dominates the view with its illuminated signage. The camera moves past the last of the cylindrical advertising pillars toward the building entrance, with the plaza opening up to reveal the corporate facade clearly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that gradually opens up to reveal a towering corporate facade. It begins amidst towering cylindrical advertising pillars emitting cyan and purple light, gliding past illuminated white benches and floating holographic displays over wet, reflective pavement. As the camera passes a figure in a red jacket and a massive Cirrus Cola advertisement, the view shifts left toward a more expansive area of the plaza. The scene then expands across a central hub characterized by rectangular reflective pools and geometric ceiling patterns, with the MaxiWear building steadily moving from the periphery to the center of the frame. Finally, the camera moves past the last of the neon pillars, crossing the mirror-like ground to approach the illuminated entrance of the dominating corporate structure.
